title: Garden Farming
description: adding some items and blocks related to agriculture.
body:
This mod adds some items and tools related to agriculture, making daily farming more convenient.

▣ Watering Can

Right-click on water sources to fill it with water. When watering, it can irrigate nearby farmland. The watering can can store bone meal like a bundle - when loaded with bone meal, watering can accelerate the growth of nearby crops.

▣ Compost Bin

Since the composter is too inefficient, this compost bin was created. It can accept all items that the composter can, converting them into bone meal. Supports hopper automation.

▣ Sickle

Right-click on crops to harvest them in an area without destroying the seeds.

![gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a37830f1c2bf00cd6fdce46893ff50ea13f19c25_0.webp)

New Enchantments:

「Light Footed」
Max Level: I
Applicable: Boots
Prevents trampling farmland

「Harvest」
Max Level: III
Applicable: Sickle
Increases the sickle's harvest radius

Additional blocks that can be catalyzed by the watering can and additional items that can be placed in the compost bin can be added through the configuration file.

Configuration file path:
`config/garden_farming-common.toml`
